title: Sub-items columns have disappeared
excerpt: Hello, I have made an automation to add subitems with columns to my items when their status changes. The automation works perfectly, but today I noticed that the columns have disappeared from all of my subitems. This doe…

posts.author: BonnieW (Bonnie Woolley)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, I have made an automation to add subitems with columns to my items when their status changes. The automation works perfectly, but today I noticed that the columns have disappeared from all of my subitems. This doesn’t seem to be related to the automation process. I’m attaching a screenshot of what’s hidden and not, to see if there’s something obvious that I’m not getting… Thanks for your help!

Columns disappearing1718×1196 162 KB

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Bonnie,

Sorry you’re experiencing this odd behaviour!

Can you please test this in an incognito window and let me know if this changes anything?

posts.author: BonnieW (Bonnie Woolley)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello! I restarted everything this morning and the subcolumns are back. Very strange though!!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Phewh - glad to hear it! Sorry for the temporary concern! Let me know if you run into the same issue again

posts.author: BonnieW (Bonnie Woolley)
posts.cookedHtml: I will, thanks!
